Avatar.title: Avatar
Avatar.description: A digital representation of a user anchored on Earth.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the owner.

imageUrl.description: Base64 encoded drawing of the avatar.

lastVisit.description: Timestamp of the last time the user visited.

lastLogTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the last life log entry generated.

currentStatus.description: A short narrative of their current situation.

LifeLog.title: LifeLog
LifeLog.description: A daily log entry for an avatar's life.

uid.description: The UID of the avatar owner.

text.description: The content of the log entry.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the log entry.

/avatars/{avatarId}/life_logs/{logId}.description: Subcollection of life logs for an avatar.
